[正面] Definitely worth your time.

items.summary:
Definitely worth your time.
Gorgeous artstyle.
Great gameplay.
Awesome characters.
Generous pulls.
The only downside is, the game is far in (CN release November 2023) and You are jumping on "Global release" (Steam release with eng translation which is quite bad) train. 
So missed 1/2 year anniversary, lot of characters (They rerun tho), rewards.
IF devs spent some coin on marketing, this game could prosper much more... or listen to feedback from community.

Addition after A year and smth.
Devs did a lot of QoLs, changed a lot, listened... finally.
It is a free gacha game, with amazing characters and dark catching story, definitely should try.

items.title: [负面] 不互通我玩什么steam版呢我请问，你游有猫真是这辈子有了

items.summary: 蛮好玩的，刚玩没多久，别的玩家说的砍强度还没体会过，相对其他手游氪度不算高，富哥几百块钱就能玩的很爽，机制也有趣，资源给的也多不吝啬，不氪金的就慢慢玩
